title: Moistling Origin
description: An aquatic elemental origin specialising in life under the seas
body:
This datapacks adds a whole new origins ocean experience for your minecraft worlds or servers. Introducing...

The Moistling
-------------------------------
Description: Mystical elemental creatures made from the essence of pure water, Moistlings are intertwined with the element in many way but love to be moist.

Water Pulsation (Primary): Channel your elemental powers into a powerful water pulse that knocks back enemies and deals massive damage. The perfect defence and offense for any encounter

Passives:

Flowing Water: Moistlings are made of pure water, You have no lungs and have a dark blue colour when outside the water

Moist states: Entering the water makes you invisible and exiting the water makes you visible. You also have a shorter stature for extra mobility underwater

Hasty Traveller: You manoeuvre very fast in your environment and have increased vision however you have to break blocks the same as humans underwater

Aquavorious: Being made of water, You can only heal and saturate when fully submerged. Being outside of
water prevents any healing or hunger processes, while being unable to eat any food at all. You can however gain food from rain and drinking water bottles


Negatives:

Puddle Consequence: Having no hunger points results you losing control of your moist states making you into a puddle, You will start taking damage in your puddle form unless you submerge yourself underwater. Eventually you will dry out from the heat leading to death

Slippery Grip: You cant use ranged weapons since you lack the correct appendages to use them and you are pure water so they would slip out of your grip

Need for Moisture: As water, You take double fire damage and start to evaporate when on fire

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Developers Note: This origins is only available for versions 1.19+, The Moistling was part of the Aquatic Origins Jam for the origins discord with the sole purpose of being unique, fun and not a direct copy of the Merling. This is one of the first origins ill be posting on the modrinth since its one of my favourite due to its simplicity and all the mentioned reasons above. Have fun playing this

DM me on Discord for any bugs, issues or general comments you wish to tell me.
